# sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group (Data Source)

Information about an AppRun dedicated auto scaling group

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster" "main" {
  name = "Gkii8dvRskKjYOGzxL3D"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group" "by_id" {
  cluster_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  id         = "A5F8D577-7395-4EB4-83D9-AC60A1EF2C5B"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group" "by_name" {
  cluster_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  name       = "HejIrLkM2DWO8UPQvGOw"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) The cluster ID that the auto_scaling_group belongs to

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the auto_scaling_group.
- `name` (String) The name of the auto_scaling_group.

### Read-Only

- `current_nodes` (Number) The current number of nodes. You might want to ignore_changes this field because it changes from time to time
- `deleting` (Boolean) Whether the auto scaling group is being deleted
- `interfaces` (Attributes Set) The network interfaces for the nodes (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces))
- `max_nodes` (Number) Maximum number of nodes
- `min_nodes` (Number) Minimum number of nodes
- `name_servers` (List of String) The name servers for the auto scaling group
- `worker_service_class_path` (String) The worker service class path
- `zone` (String) The zone name where the auto scaling group is located

<a id="nestedatt--interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `connects_to_lb` (Boolean) Whether the interface connects to the load balancer
- `default_gateway` (String) The default gateway
- `interface_index` (Number) The interface index
- `ip_pool` (Attributes Set) The IP pool for the interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces--ip_pool))
- `netmask_len` (Number) The netmask length
- `packet_filter_id` (String) The packet filter ID
- `upstream` (String) The upstream network

<a id="nestedatt--interfaces--ip_pool"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces.ip_pool`

Read-Only:

- `end` (String) The end IP address of the range
- `start` (String) The start IP address of the range
